**Fukui reactivity result — computed.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui reactivity indices from Mulliken charges, **DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (chemkit DFT backend; PySCF Mulliken charges), tier `standard`, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ used from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz` (13 atoms); no geometry optimization was reported by this task. Cation/anion finite-difference states used by the tool: cation charge +1 multiplicity 2; anion charge −1 multiplicity 2. Software version and live `.out` log path were not included in the returned tool JSON. The exact CLI reported by chemkit was:
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpn0bmg5ty/live.json`

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 3 (C, 1-based label), with **f+ = 2.1028319**. Most nucleophilic site = atom 1 (O), with **f− = 0.16201477**.

No `warnings` array was returned by the tool result. Integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.
